title: stelis capijumensis
intro: Stelis capijumensis is a species of orchid native to Brazil, belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stelis capijumensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
